name: hsb-teamwork
description: HSB Teamwork — a demand-to-delivery toolkit. Each step is a skill invoked as /hsb-teamwork:<skill>. Available: origination-brainstorm (raw demand -> a fully-filled, confidence-graded document via a multi-agent pipeline, plus humanized/translated/enriched variants); readiness-package (the Product Owner's two-act journey: Act 1 triages an origination-record into a routing decision recorded as an Intake Record — only Product Ready proceeds — then Act 2 turns it into a frozen Readiness Package via draft-then-confirm with parallel section drafting and CTO-escalation detection); tech-assessment (the CTO's journey: respond to an escalated, frozen RP with a Technical Assessment — classify the demand nature greenfield/brownfield, judge feasibility as the first-class decision with a veto path, draft architectural impact, NFR feasibility, suggested ADRs and firm cost, and seed/reference the persistent tech-landscape KB — discharging the RP's TechAssessmentRef debt; the technical half that merges with the RP into the PRD); prd-generation (the PRD merge: stitch the frozen RP (product) and the signed TA (technical) into the PRD — the single artifact that opens the downstream and is delivered to the PM — by inheriting Part A from the RP and Part B from the TA, composing the combined executive summary, reconciling the scope against the CTO's constraints, consolidating product+technical risks, carrying the firm effort, and closing with a dual PO+CTO sign-off; it preserves authorship and invents no facts, handles the no-escalation path (RP alone, Part B N/A), and halts on a vetoed TA). Template-driven and portable; includes a Codex adapter.
